Notice And Motion For Change Of Venue And Transfer To Riverside County
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS CORPORATION'S Motion for Change of Venue from the San Francisco Superior Court to Superior Court, Riverside County, State of California. Appearances: John D. Nelson, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 347-6080 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiffs and opposing party; Kate M. Neiswender, Esq. Attorney at Law, (805) 649-5575 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION GRANTED, MATTER TRANSFERRED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY, SUPERIOR COURT, STATE OF CALIFORNIA WHERE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR # 4780
